text: Hello, this is a present message that you can edit in your code in OnlyChat.js (initialMessages).
This is the second message, you can edit, add more, or delete me.
Hello! How can I assist you today?
i think we need to write together a poem, can u start with the first row
Whispers of the night sky sang softly to the moon,
can the poem be about books
Dusty pages hold worlds where dreams and stories weave,
I wait all day so I can leave,
To wander through realms where imagination takes its flight,
I have a way there to shine bright,
Through every tale and turn, my spirit finds its light.
Tell me soldier, do I have to fight?
In battles of the mind, courage often takes the lead,
My kid is waiting for me to feed,
In stories shared, we find the sustenance we need.
Yes, it's a beautifully woven poem with deep imagery!
